top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.faceName AS name
FROM cards c
WHERE c.isPromo = 1
  AND c.availability LIKE '%arena%'
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.faceName NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.faceName
    FROM cards c2
    WHERE c2.isReprint = 1
       OR c2.availability NOT LIKE '%arena%'
       OR c2.isPromo = 0
  )
ORDER BY c.faceName
LIMIT 3;

SELECT DISTINCT c.faceName
FROM cards c
WHERE c.isPromo = 1
  AND c.availability LIKE '%arena%'
  AND c.faceName NOT IN (
    SELECT faceName FROM cards WHERE isPromo = 0
  )
ORDER BY c.faceName
LIMIT 3;

SELECT DISTINCT c.faceName AS name
FROM cards c
WHERE c.isPromo = 1
  AND c.availability LIKE '%arena%'
  AND c.power IS NULL
  AND c.faceName NOT IN (
    SELECT c2.faceName
    FROM cards c2
    WHERE c2.power IS NOT NULL
       OR c2.isReprint = 1
       OR c2.availability NOT LIKE '%arena%'
       OR c2.isPromo = 0
  )
ORDER BY c.faceName
LIMIT 3;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.faceName AS name
FROM cards c
WHERE c.isPromo = 1
  AND c.availability LIKE '%arena%'
  AND c.isReprint = 0
  AND c.faceName NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.faceName
    FROM cards c2
    WHERE c2.isReprint = 1
       OR c2.availability NOT LIKE '%arena%'
       OR c2.isPromo = 0
  )
ORDER BY c.faceName
LIMIT 3;
